mapper.select:
SELECT j.*, c.company_name FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN company_profiles c ON j.company_id = c.id WHERE j.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND (j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND j.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND j.industry = #{industry}
ORDER BY j.created_at DESC
SELECT j.*, c.company_name FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN company_profiles c ON j.company_id = c.id WHERE j.id = #{id}
SELECT j.*, c.company_name FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN company_profiles c ON j.company_id = c.id WHERE j.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY j.created_at DESC
